title: Detect seed mock isolation for live Ollama operator proofs
problem: Operator proof session (2026-06-16) showed rank-2 live detect pytest fails when seed_domain_opposing_context runs extract-claims under global RGE_LLM_MODE=ollama — live model rejects GT7 seed claims. Seed steps should force mock LLM while detect step remains live.
acceptance_criteria: seed_domain_opposing_context completes with 0 accepted claims under global live Ollama env.
Rank-1 and rank-2 live detect pytest modules pass or skip only on catalog drift — not seed failure.
non_goals: Changing live detect fallthrough CLI behavior.
rollback_plan: Revert staged_domain_seed and detect test edits.
